title: App Settings - General - About - New update available
scenario: Verify that when an app update is available, the About section shows update details, and tapping Release Notes or Update buttons navigates correctly.
steps: 1. Ensure an app update is available on the Cloud.
2. Navigate to App Settings > General > About section.
5. Observe the release notes page opens.
6. Tap the 'X' button on the release notes page.
7. Observe the behavior after closing release notes.
9. Observe the result of tapping the Update button.
expected:
1. The About section displays: "App Updates Needed" text, an "Update" button, current and available firmware versions, and a link to Release Notes.
2. Tapping the Release Notes link opens the release notes page.
3. Tapping the "X" button closes the Release Notes and returns to the General section with About expanded.
4. Tapping the "Update" button opens the app store page for Poly Lens.
